description:
Configure Firefox for OSINT investigations using isolated containers to prevent cross-site tracking.

1. Go to the Mozilla Add-ons store and install the official 'Firefox Multi-Account Containers' extension.
2. Open the extension or Firefox container settings.
3. Create a new container exactly named 'OSINT_Alpha', set its color to 'red', and its icon to the 'briefcase'.
4. Create a second new container exactly named 'OSINT_Beta', set its color to 'purple', and its icon to the 'fingerprint'.
5. Open a new tab specifically INSIDE the 'OSINT_Alpha' container and navigate to exactly: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open-source_intelligence
6. Open another new tab specifically INSIDE the 'OSINT_Beta' container and navigate to exactly: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Signals_intelligence
7. Leave both of these containerized tabs open and active.
